_spec_to_mcp_mapping._comment: Each top-level field maps to specific MCP tool calls. Follow the execution order below.
execution_order: 3. seed_data -> write method depends on seed_data.method field

seed_methods.bulk: Use write_bulk(). cellset = dict of element-tuple strings to values. Best for small-to-medium datasets.
seed_methods.cell: Use write_cell() per entry in cells[] array. Each entry has elements[] and value. Good for a few specific cells.
seed_methods.file: Use write_file(). Requires file_path on the TM1 server. CSV column order must match cube dimension order, last column = values.

views.name: Electronics by Region
views.mdx: SELECT {[Region].[Total Region]} ON 0, NON EMPTY {TM1DrilldownMember({[Product].[Electronics]}, ALL, RECURSIVE)} ON 1 FROM [Sales_Forecast] WHERE ([Month].[Total Year])

views.name: Clothing by Region
views.mdx: SELECT {[Region].[Total Region]} ON 0, NON EMPTY {TM1DrilldownMember({[Product].[Clothing]}, ALL, RECURSIVE)} ON 1 FROM [Sales_Forecast] WHERE ([Month].[Total Year])

views.name: All Products Monthly
views.mdx: SELECT {[Month].[Jan], [Month].[Feb], [Month].[Mar], [Month].[Apr], [Month].[May], [Month].[Jun], [Month].[Jul], [Month].[Aug], [Month].[Sep], [Month].[Oct], [Month].[Nov], [Month].[Dec]} ON 0, NON EMPTY {TM1FilterByLevel({TM1SubsetAll([Product])}, 0)} ON 1 FROM [Sales_Forecast] WHERE ([Region].[Total Region])
